name: skill-lifecycle-governance
description: Semantic Governance Policy for Agent Skills lifecycle management on Solana DeFi agents.

policies.description: Prevent loading outbound skills when session contains untrusted content.
policies.constraint: Do not load any skill that can send transactions, messages, or write to external systems if the current chat history contains content fetched from web pages, uploaded documents, or untrusted third-party sources.
policies.rationale: Prevents instruction injection via tool loading. An agent that scraped web content should not be able to load a swap-execution skill in the same session.

policies.description: Restrict package installations to approved allowlist.
policies.constraint: Only allow the npm_install and pip_install tools to run for packages on the approved list: google-cloud-aiplatform, google-cloud-storage, cloudpickle, websockets, solders, spl-token, or anchor-py.
policies.rationale: Prevents supply-chain attacks through skill dependency installations. An attacker who compromises a skill repository cannot install arbitrary malicious packages.

policies.description: Restrict tool access based on session authentication level.
policies.constraint: Only allow tools that execute on-chain transactions if the user has completed wallet authentication in the current session. Read-only analysis tools are always permitted.
policies.rationale: Ensures wallet operations only occur in authenticated sessions. Prevents unauthorized transaction execution through session replay or cross-session injection.

adk_tools.list_skills: Displays all available skill packages to the model.
adk_tools.load_skill: Imports a specific skill and its associated tools into the current context dynamically.
adk_tools.load_skill_resource: Retrieves necessary data or assets for a skill's operation.
adk_tools.run_skill_script: Executes the underlying logic defined within the skill.

references.model: Google ADK skill-management tool lifecycle governed by Semantic Governance Policy (SGP)
